caption: The video features Jeff Kelly, a Senior Analyst at Wikibon, speaking at the Big Data SV 2015 event. He is dressed in a gray suit with a white shirt and a plaid tie, and he appears to be engaged in a discussion or presentation. Jeff is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating that he is explaining or emphasizing a point. The background prominently displays the event's hashtag, #BigDataSV, along with the year 2015. The setting suggests a professional conference environment focused on big data topics. The lower third of the screen provides additional information about Jeff Kelly, including his Twitter handle @jeffreyfkelly and his affiliation with Wikibon.
